title: Presentation Template Demo
summary: A compact deck showing the imported skill, the new layout engine, and the native PDF build flow.
note: Slides are authored once and reused across PDF rendering, geometry checks, and render validation.

cards.title: Slide modules
cards.body: Slides stay as small CommonJS modules with one exported entry point.

cards.title: Layout primitives
cards.body: Shared helpers and layout frames keep spacing decisions out of individual slides.

cards.title: Validation gate
cards.body: Geometry, text-fit, and render checks keep PDF output stable as the deck evolves.
